_comment: Write servo PWM endpoints for a single channel. The descriptor declares channel/minPwm/maxPwm/trimPwm; this body forwards them to the Layer 0 command by reference. Stack converters expand the command into the appropriate PARAM_SET writes and validate read-back.

then.detail: Servo endpoint write was accepted but one or more read-back values did not match.
Servo endpoint parameter write was rejected by the autopilot.
Servo endpoint calibration cancelled by operator.
Servo endpoint calibration failed with an unhandled outcome — see the audit trace for the underlying response.
